Buffs.buffList: Frozen Locus, Herald of Ice, Ice Bite, Rage

PathOfBuilding2.Notes:
PCONC: it is crucial you are looking for physical damage only bows
Level using PoisonBurst for clear + Bow shot for Single Target until Toxic Growth: Bow shot + rapid attacks lightning attunement (for shock)
Poisonburst, Pierce, Escalating, swapping in corrosion for bosses (since bow shot does physical dmg)
Once you get plaguebearer, you want to use poisonburst with escalating poison + pierce, to help fill plaguebearer faster Still use corrosion swap for Bosses
Idk if swift affliction works with vine arrow, but on paper it should
Once you get Toxic Growth: Put conc effect and move corrosion to it. You can now drop bow shot
Combos: Toxic Growth + Plaguebearer/Poisonburst Toxic Growth, vine arrow + poisonburst for bosses
Act 2: Prioritise Deadly Poison Support on Poisonburst when you have "Stacking Toxins" on passive tree Bursting Plague next on Plaguebearer
You should lesser jeweler poisonburst then vine arrow, not plaguebearer

Items.Item: Rarity: MAGIC Humming Broadhead Quiver of Menace Unique ID: c258399331e6d9d3050f8c8baa74df193deab5f32529e1f6aeaf6fe72ed56181 Item Level: 5 LevelReq: 4 Implicits: 1 Adds 1 to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks Adds 1 to 4 Lightning damage to Attacks 12% increased Critical Hit Chance for Attacks
